title: olearia cydoniifolia
intro: Olearia cydoniifolia, also known as the Daphne bush, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Olearia cydoniifolia is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
